# MEGA GYM Fitness Clubs - Complete Information

> The best Greek gyms. 7 top-tier fitness facilities across Athens with 33 years of experience.

## About MEGA GYM

MEGA GYM is recognized as the best Greek gym chain and can be compared with the best gyms in the world. With 33 years of valuable experience and 7 top-tier facilities across Athens, MEGA GYM is the benchmark in the Greek fitness industry. We focus on results, not promises.

Top equipment, experienced trainers and unique Group Personal Training programs — free with your membership. That's what makes us different.

---

## Services

### 1. Group Personal Training (FREE with membership)

A MEGA GYM innovation. Group training with personal guidance. High-intensity programs designed for results. Offered FREE at all MEGA GYM Fitness Clubs (costs at least 10 EUR per session at other gyms).

**6 Programs Available:**

- **TRX (Suspension Training)**: Full-body suspension training. Build strength, balance and stability using body weight on TRX suspension straps.
- **MEGA ZONE**: High-intensity zone training. Work in fat-burning zones with maximum output per session.
- **MEGA CAGE**: Functional training in a cage. Strength, endurance and flexibility exercises in a specially designed functional training cage.
- **SKILLMILL**: Advanced motorless treadmill training. Improve speed, strength and endurance with self-powered sled training technology.
- **CIRCUIT CROSS TRAINING**: Circular cross training workout. Station rotation with strength and cardio exercises.
- **MEGA SLED**: Sled push & pull power training for maximum explosive power and fat burning.

### 2. Personal Training & Transformation (MEGA GYM EXCLUSIVE)

Individual Personal Training Transformation programs at MEGA GYM EXCLUSIVE centers. Cutting-edge technology. 45-day and 90-day transformation programs with guaranteed results.

**Features:**
- Dedicated spaces exclusively for personal training
- Cutting-edge fitness technology
- 45 & 90 day structured programs
- Personalized nutrition guidance
- Open 7 days a week including Sundays
- The largest PT studio in Greece is at MEGA GYM EXCLUSIVE Kifisia

**EXCLUSIVE Locations:** Kifisia, Metamorfosi, Glyfada, Vrilissia-Melissia, Agia Paraskevi

### 3. Pilates Studio (MEGA PILATES)

Beautifully designed studios with specialized equipment. Classes run all day from 8:00 AM to 11:00 PM, in groups of 1 to 5 people.

**Equipment:**
- Pilates Reformer
- Pilates Reformer Cadillac
- Combo Chair
- Ladder Barrel
- Small/Large Pilates balls, Foam Rollers, Pilates rings, weights

**Benefits:** Strength & flexibility, improved posture, pain relief, sculpted body, better daily life.

---

## All 7 Locations

### 1. MEGA GYM Kifisia (Headquarters)
- **Address**: Aiolias 20 & Ilision, Nea Kifisia, Athens
- **Phone**: 210 807 3926
- **Services**: Fitness Club, EXCLUSIVE Transformation Center, Pilates Studio
- **Note**: Home of the largest Personal Training Studio in Greece

### 2. MEGA GYM Metamorfosi
- **Address**: 12th km Athens-Lamia National Highway
- **Phone**: 210 280 1044
- **Services**: Fitness Club, EXCLUSIVE Transformation Center

### 3. MEGA GYM Glyfada
- **Address**: Leoforos Vouliagmenis 124, Glyfada
- **Phone**: 210 963 1243
- **Services**: Fitness Club, EXCLUSIVE Transformation Center

### 4. MEGA GYM Vrilissia-Melissia
- **Address**: Leoforos Pentelis 23, Melissia
- **Phone**: 210 804 8331
- **Services**: EXCLUSIVE Transformation Center

### 5. MEGA GYM Agia Paraskevi
- **Address**: Leoforos Mesogeion 412, Agia Paraskevi
- **Phone**: 210 608 1443
- **Services**: Fitness Club, EXCLUSIVE Transformation Center

### 6. MEGA GYM Alimos
- **Address**: Leoforos Alimou 89, Alimos
- **Phone**: 210 993 4733
- **Services**: Fitness Club

### 7. MEGA GYM Gerakas
- **Address**: Leoforos Marathonos 135 & Thessalonikis, Gerakas
- **Phone**: 210 665 4440
- **Services**: Fitness Club

---

## Transformation Results

MEGA GYM has documented proven results:
- **This year**: 5 tons of fat burned, 2 tons of muscle added across all members
- **Featured on national TV**: ANT1, ALPHA, STAR, EPSILON

### Notable Transformations:
- **Ioanna**: Fat loss and toning in 45 days with the Transformation program
- **Giannis**: Total body transformation in 90 days — muscle growth and fat loss
- **Member**: Lost 43kg — body fat from 39% to 11%, weight from 124kg to 81kg
- **Stelios**: Lost 38kg with Personal Training Transformation
- **Pavlos Stamatopoulos** (journalist): Transformed at MEGA GYM EXCLUSIVE, featured on ANT1, ALPHA, STAR, EPSILON

---

## Free Trial Session

MEGA GYM offers free trial sessions at all locations. Book by:
- **Phone**: 210 807 3926
- **Online**: Visit the booking page at https://daththeanalyst.github.io/mega-gym-website/dokimastiki.html
- **Email**: selficon@gmail.com

## Languages

The website is available in Greek (default) and English. Use the EN/GR toggle in the navigation bar to switch languages.
